calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Streett for Petitioner.

The Court raised the issue of distribution being made to the Trustees and not to the individuals. Mr. Streett stated that the Trustees and the individuals are one in the same and that there are no extenuating circumstances. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Helen Yune-Trowbridge. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Leonardini. (Not Reported)
